An authenticated user with workflow edit access could inject arbitrary JavaScript into the Chat Trigger's generated page by setting a malicious `webhookId`. When a logged-in user visited the chat URL, the injected code executed in the n8n origin with that user's session privileges.

## Patches
The issue has been fixed in n8n versions 1.123.55, 2.25.7, and 2.26.2. Users should upgrade to one of these versions or later to remediate the vulnerability.

## Workarounds
If upgrading is not immediately possible, administrators should consider the following temporary mitigations:
- Limit workflow creation and editing permissions to fully trusted users only.
- Disable the Chat Trigger node by adding `@n8n/n8n-nodes-langchain.chatTrigger` to the `NODES_EXCLUDE` environment variable.

These workarounds do not fully remediate the risk and should only be used as short-term mitigation measures.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.0021, "percentile": 0.11199}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-42h7-m79w-wvg5", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-16T22:39:32Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-42h7-m79w-wvg5", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-42h7-m79w-wvg5"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-54302"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-06-23T17:17:06Z", "published_at": "2026-06-16T22:39:32Z", "references": ["https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n/security/advisories/GHSA-42h7-m79w-wvg5", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-54302", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-42h7-m79w-wvg5"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/n8n-io/n8n/security-advisories/GHSA-42h7-m79w-wvg5", "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n", "summary": "n8n: Stored XSS in Chat Trigger Node", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-07-20T13:44:04Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-42h7-m79w-wvg5", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "1.123.55", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "n8n"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 1.123.55"}, {"first_patched_version": "2.26.2", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "n8n"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 2.26.0, < 2.26.2"}, {"first_patched_version": "2.25.7", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "n8n"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 2.0.0-rc.0, < 2.25.7"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: n8n: Stored XSS in Chat Trigger Node
